      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.util.List<Description> QueryManager.getDescriptions​(java.lang.String conceptId)
      Returns list of Descriptions associated for a given concept identifier and which is other than FSN.

      CompositeDescription is extended from Description.
      Methods in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.model that return types with arguments of type Description 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.util.List<Description> Concept.getDescriptions()
      Returns all Descriptions for this Concept other than its FSN.
      Method parameters in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.model with type arguments of type Description 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void Concept.setDescriptions​(java.util.List<Description> descriptions)
      Sets the list of Description corresponding to the SNOMED CT concept.

      Compares two Description objects on the basis of textual representation.
